Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: `export { Hono }`
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point for Hono framework, re-exports key types and the Hono class
+- Copy-safe detail: Main export point, re-exports Hono class and types from sub-modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, HonoBase
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, Variables, BlankEnv, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, JSONValue, Simplify, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, UnionToIntersection, Response, TypedResponse, Context, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, ToSchema, AddSchemaIfHasResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions module providing handler types, route definitions, and utility types for Hono's typing system
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-only module with no runtime code, provides type safety for routes, handlers, and middleware
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: `export class Hono`
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class implementation extending HonoBase with default router configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Primary Hono app class, sets up default routing with SmartRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: handler middleware, `export const createHono`, `ErrorHandler` usage
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, createHono, router, errorHandler, middleware, context, routeIndex, finalized, error, res, clone, basePath, init, fetch, route, set, param, get, query, input, header, body, json, html, cookie, cache, set, get, status
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types, ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: HonoBase base class providing route registration, request handling, and middleware composition
+- Copy-safe detail: Core routing and handler infrastructure, error handling via ErrorHandler
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: `export { Context }`, `c res: Response`, `c.req`, `c.header`, `c.query`, `c.json`, `c.html`
+- Internal names noticed: ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, HonoRequest, Env, FetchEventLike, H, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse, StatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, BaseMime, ResponseHeader, InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue, resolveCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime, ./utils/headers, ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: Context class providing request access, response creation, and request/response methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Core Context API for request handling and response generation
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: `export type { HonoRequest }`
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Request, URL, RequestInit, body, json, query, params, headers, input, form, routeIndex, method, finalized
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: HonoRequest class implementing Request-like interface with extended HTTP method handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Request abstraction layer with matching logic and method handling
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: `export const GET_MATCH_RESULT`
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Symbol constant for successful route matching
+- Copy-safe detail: Single exported symbol for pattern matching
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: `export const parseBody`
+- Internal names noticed: parseBody, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, BodyDataValue, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, SimplifyBodyData, BodyData, File, ParseBodyOptions, all, dot, FormData, Request, FormDataEntryValue
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for handling form data and file uploads
+- Copy-safe detail: Type definitions and parseBody function for form body analysis
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: `export const compose`
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, index, middleware, index, res, isError, handler, routeIndex, finalized, context, error
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility following koa-compose pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: Composition function for executing middleware chain with error handling
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: `export class HTTPException`
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, HTTPExceptionOptions, status, res, message, cause, getResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException class for throwing HTTP errors with custom status codes and messages
+- Copy-safe detail: Extendable Error that returns Response via getResponse method
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: `export { hc }`, `export { parseResponse, DetailedError }`
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main client exports - hc for client creation, utils for response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports hc factory from ./client and parseResponse/DetailedError from ./utils
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: `hc` factory function, `new Client()` class
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, url, method, buildSearchParams, queryParams, searchParams, path, body, data, status, headers, options, callback method, proxy, request, method, params, pathSegments, buildFullPath, url, body, method, request, client, methods
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ./types, ./utils, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: hc factory creates typed HTTP client proxy from Hono app for making API requests
+- Copy-safe detail: Proxy pattern wraps callback with path tracking for type-safe client requests
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client type, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponseOfEndpoint
+- Internal names noticed: Client, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, METHODS, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ./utils, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types, ../router
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client - Client interface, request/response types, BuildSearchParamsFn
+- Copy-safe detail: Pure type module for TypeScript client-side type inference
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: `mergePath`, `replaceUrlParam`, `buildSearchParams`, `replaceUrlProtocol`, `removeIndexString`, `deepMerge`, `export { DetailedError }`
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, isObject, ObjectType, deepMerge, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side utility functions for URL manipulation, query string building, and object merging
+- Copy-safe detail: String manipulation and mergePath functions plus deepMerge for client options
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: `fetchRP` async function, `DetailedError` class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, fetchRP, DetailedError, detail, code, log, statusCode, jsonRegex, hasBody, detectResponseType, contentType, _data, _bodyInit, Response
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch helper that parses responses and throws structured DETAILED errors on failure
+- Copy-safe detail: Returns _data from Response if ok, else throws DetailedError with code and detail
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: `fire` registration function
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, HandleOptions, addEventListener
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter to register Hono app with fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: addEventListener('fetch') with handle(app, options) handler
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: `handle` function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: handle, Handler, HandleOptions, FetchEvent, fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates fetch handler for service worker by wrapping Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: async handler calls app.fetch and falls back to global fetch on 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface, ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent, waitUntil, preloadResponse, request, clientId, handled, resultingClientId
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript declarations for Service Worker FetchEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: Interface definitions for ExtendableEvent with service worker methods
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to create a benchmark file for the core-api-read-write-ledger task. Let me first check if the bench-artifacts directory exists and read all the specified source files to extract the required information.
